property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot\;C:\Users\msi\scoop\shims;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\msi\.local in;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\msi\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 in;c:\Users\msi\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Successful login
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Successful login &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/01_login.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser logs in with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"secret_sauce"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_logs_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser should see products page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_should_see_products_page()&amp#27;[0m

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.23.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Add product to cart
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add product to cart &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/02_cart.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is logged in with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"secret_sauce"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser adds &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Sauce Labs Backpack"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CartSteps.user_adds_product_to_cart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mcart badge should show &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"1"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CartSteps.cart_badge_should_show(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mcart should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Sauce Labs Backpack"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CartSteps.cart_should_contain_product(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Successful checkout
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Successful checkout &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/04_checkout.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser logs in with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"secret_sauce"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_logs_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser adds &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Sauce Labs Backpack"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CartSteps.user_adds_product_to_cart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser proceeds to checkout&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.user_proceeds_to_checkout()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser fills checkout form with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Ali"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Veli"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"34000"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.user_fills_checkout_form(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser completes the purchase&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.user_completes_purchase()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32morder should be successful&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.order_should_be_successful()&amp#27;[0m

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.23.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Checkout validation fails when first name is empty
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Checkout validation fails when first name is empty &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/04_checkout.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser logs in with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"secret_sauce"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_logs_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser adds &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Sauce Labs Backpack"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CartSteps.user_adds_product_to_cart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser proceeds to checkout&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.user_proceeds_to_checkout()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser fills checkout form with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Veli"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"34000"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.user_fills_checkout_form(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mcheckout error message should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.CheckoutSteps.checkout_error_message_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Sort products by price low to high
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Sort products by price low to high &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/05_sorting.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is logged in with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"secret_sauce"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser sorts products by &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Price (low to high)"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.ProductSteps.user_sorts_products(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mproducts should be sorted by price ascending&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.ProductSteps.verify_sorting()&amp#27;[0m
